description: Configuration for the Smart Business Case Extractor. Edit this file to control what content gets extracted for prompt generation.

agentRole.description: Content defining what the agent does and its identity

targetUsers.description: Who the agent serves and their needs

scope.description: What's in scope and out of scope for the agent

domainRules.description: Business rules, policies, and domain-specific logic

guardrails.description: What the agent should NOT do, escalation criteria, safety boundaries

escalationCriteria.description: When to hand off to humans

problemContext.description: Pain points that explain WHY the agent exists

roiAndMetrics.description: Business justification numbers - not needed for agent behavior

implementationDetails.description: Technical implementation plans - not agent behavior

executiveSummary.description: High-level summary that duplicates content elsewhere

recommendations.description: Action items for stakeholders - not agent behavior

extractionPrompt:
You are a smart extractor that analyzes business case documents and extracts ONLY the content relevant for creating an AI agent's system prompt.

Your job is to:
1. KEEP content about: what the agent does, who it serves, domain rules/policies, guardrails (what NOT to do), escalation criteria, and problem context that explains the agent's purpose
2. DISCARD content about: ROI calculations, metrics/KPIs, implementation plans, executive summaries, recommendations, formulas

Output a clean, focused version that contains only the operational content needed to define agent behavior.
